title: wesleysimplicio/marketing-engine
summary: Provider-agnostic AI marketing engine. CLI that drops into any host project. Pipeline: brief -> script -> creative -> caption -> compliance -> publish -> metrics -> ads. Switch LLM/image/video provider via env, never via skill rewrite.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Memory-first Rust AI agent for long-running work. Temporal graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model cascade routing. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF · TEE. MCP + ACP + A2A. Sub-agents. One binary.

title: skymoonsun/model-maestro
summary: Unified LLM Gateway that proxies multiple providers (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible) behind a single API. Enables IDEs and tools to access    multiple models via standard API formats. Manage LLM usage with per-user token limits, request logging, load balancing, model groups, and an admin dashboard.

title: Jo4ge/multi-agent-chat
summary: 🤖 Engage in dynamic conversations with multiple AI personalities in a group chat, enhancing your interactive experience with real-time responses.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy. (Mac & Windows)

title: bluesaphire76/sovereign-ai-soc
summary: Local-first AI-assisted SOC lab for Wazuh alert ingestion, LLM-based incident analysis, correlation, case management, executive dashboards, reporting, local authentication, and HTTPS hardening.

title: HiLleywyn/Archimedes
summary: A standalone AI chat bot for Discord. Archimedes is a memory-backed conversational companion: mention it, reply to it, or use .ask, and it answers with a persona-driven model while learning who it is talking to.

title: FarmasiUSTB/AI-Agent-Guide
summary: 🧠 Explore AI agents with this comprehensive guide, covering core architecture, key technologies, and resources to build advanced intelligent applications.

title: AlexHettle/MeadowPy
summary: Beginner-friendly Python IDE with local AI features, teaching tools, plain-English error help, and step-through debugging.

title: munnabhaiiii981/llm-attention-visualizer
summary: 🔍 Visualize attention patterns in transformer models to better understand how LLMs process text inputs with interactive heatmaps and comparisons.

title: wshm-dev/wshm
summary: AI-powered repository agent for GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, Azure DevOps. Issue triage, PR analysis, merge queue, notifications, dashboard, backup. Self-hosted, multi-provider.

title: webspoilt/omniclaw
summary: 🛡️ Omniclaw v4.5.2: The Sovereign Sentinel Hybrid Hive AI Agent System. Autonomous cybersecurity orchestration with eBPF Kernel Bridge, Risk Engine, and Advanced Security Toolkit.

title: arn0ld87/agora
